metadata.scope: Monthly base compensation for remote workers in India, reported in two market contexts: local employer rates (Glassdoor India, Payscale India, Indeed India) and US employer remote rates (Arc.dev; estimated from BLS OES May 2024 offshore discount bands where direct data is unavailable). Both series are reported with full source citations.
metadata.notes: INR equivalents calculated at USD/INR 96.28 (May 16, 2026). Local employer ranges represent 30th–70th percentile of reported compensation from Indian salary databases. US employer remote ranges reflect what US-based employers pay remote workers in India, sourced from Arc.dev or estimated at validated offshore discount percentages of the BLS OES May 2024 US domestic median.

bls_reference.source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics — Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS), May 2024
bls_reference.note: Annual median wages divided by 12 to derive monthly figures. Used as US domestic benchmark for offshore discount percentage calculations.

local_employer.caveats: Compensation reflects Bangalore, Hyderabad, and Pune markets; Tier-2 city rates typically 15–25% lower. Figures are base salary only; equity and variable components excluded.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Software Developer Salary in India 2026

local_employer.caveats: Senior-level compensation shows high variance between product companies (higher) and services firms (lower). Data skewed toward Tier-1 metro respondents.

sources.name: Glassdoor India — Senior Software Engineer Salaries

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Senior Software Engineer Salary in India 2026

local_employer.caveats: Full-stack compensation varies significantly by primary stack (React/Node commands premium over PHP/jQuery stacks). Bangalore and Hyderabad command 10–20% premium.

sources.name: Payscale India — Full Stack Developer Salary
Indeed India — Full Stack Developer Salaries

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Full-Stack Developer Salary in India 2026

local_employer.caveats: Payscale India reports a local average of ₹995,702/year (approximately ₹82,975/month) for all DevOps roles. International remote rates paid by US employers are significantly higher.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote DevOps Engineer Salary in India 2026

us_baseline_reference.title: Network and Computer Systems Administrators / DevOps

local_employer.caveats: Data analyst compensation is highly dependent on domain expertise (finance analytics vs. marketing analytics) and SQL/Python proficiency level.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Data Analyst Salary in India 2026 (range midpoint)
us_employer_remote.source_note: Arc.dev reports a range of $2,667–$3,333/month for India data analysts employed by US companies. Median derived as midpoint of reported range.

local_employer.caveats: Payscale India reports a local average of ₹1,027,885/year (approximately ₹85,657/month); international remote rates reflect a premium for working in foreign-company workflows.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Data Scientist Salary in India 2026

local_employer.caveats: Automation QA engineers (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright) command a 30–50% premium over manual testers. AI testing specialist roles reported in ₹12–22 LPA range for Indian market.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote QA Engineer Salary in India 2026
us_employer_remote.source_note: Reported US employer remote median (24% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Quality Control Analysts, SOC 15-1253, $8,551/month) falls below the expected India mid-level band of 30–45%. Arc.dev figure reported as collected; treat as directional. Automation QA premiums may push realized rates toward the band floor.

us_baseline_reference.title: Software Quality Assurance Analysts and Testers

local_employer.caveats: AI/ML engineering is the fastest-growing compensation category in the Indian remote market, with demand growing 40% year-over-year against 15–20% supply growth (Glassdoor India, accessed May 2026). Senior roles with LLM/GenAI specialization command the upper range.

sources.name: Scaler — AI Engineer Salary in India 2026

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev India Data Scientist median ($4,207/month) + 15% AI/ML premium — estimated
us_employer_remote.source_note: No direct Arc.dev AI/ML Engineer India figure available as of May 2026. Figure estimated from Arc.dev India Data Scientist median ($4,207/month) with a 15% premium for AI/ML engineering scope, consistent with BLS OES spread between Data Scientists (SOC 15-2051) and Computer and Information Research Scientists (SOC 15-1221). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Flutter and React Native developers show similar compensation to native iOS/Android developers in the Indian remote market. Cross-platform experience does not carry a premium as of 2026 data.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Mobile Developer Salary in India 2026

local_employer.caveats: Payscale India reports a local average of ₹616,771/year (approximately ₹51,398/month) for UX designers across all experience levels. International remote rates reflect a premium for English-language design work for Western-market products.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1255 — estimated at 37% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: No direct Arc.dev UI/UX Designer India figure available as of May 2026. Figure estimated at 37% of BLS OES May 2024 median for UX Designers and UX Researchers (SOC 15-1255, $8,174/month annual median / 12 = $681/month — note: BLS annual is $98,090 / 12 = $8,174/month). Percentage consistent with Arc.dev observed offshore discount band for India mid-level roles (30–45%). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Product manager compensation in India reflects strong demand from global product companies establishing India hubs. Ranges show high variance between early-stage startup context and mature-product-line context.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 11-2021 — estimated at 37% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 37% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Marketing Managers (SOC 11-2021, $13,419/month). Product Manager remote hiring data for India is limited in public sources; figure uses observed Arc.dev India discount band (30–45% of US baseline) applied to the nearest available BLS occupational category. Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: PMP-certified project managers and Scrum Masters command 15–25% premium in the Indian remote market. Agile certification adds measurable value in US-employer contexts.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1082 — estimated at 37% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 37% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Project Management Specialists (SOC 13-1082, $8,396/month). Figure uses observed Arc.dev India discount band (30–45% of US baseline). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Compensation reflects US-facing customer support roles requiring strong English proficiency. Technical support roles (L2/L3) command a premium of 30–60% over voice support.

sources.name: Indeed India — Customer Support Specialist Salaries

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 43-4051 — estimated at 32% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 32% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Customer Service Representatives (SOC 43-4051, $3,570/month). Reflects offshore discount pattern observed for non-technical roles in India. Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Medical billing specialists require US-specific coding knowledge (ICD-10, CPT). Certified coders (CPC, CCS) command the upper portion of the range.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-2072 — estimated at 32% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 32% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Medical Records Specialists (SOC 29-2072, $4,188/month). No direct Arc.dev medical billing India figure available as of May 2026. CPC- or CCS-certified billers serving US healthcare clients may command the upper portion of the range. Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Indeed India reports a local average of ₹18,121/month for CAD drafters across all sectors. International remote rates for Revit/AutoCAD specialists serving US AEC firms are 2.5–4× the local average. BIM-certified drafters command the upper range.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 17-3011 — estimated at 31% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 31% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Architectural and Civil Drafters (SOC 17-3011, $5,738/month). No direct Arc.dev CAD/BIM drafter India figure available as of May 2026. AutoCAD/Revit specialists serving US AEC firms with English-language documentation capability command the upper range. Treat as directional.
